name: Preflight planner (critic-first)
description: before_prompt_build (main only): on non-trivial turns, a stronger local planner (gpt-oss) emits the solution rubric + an explicit expert-dispatch list and injects it so the weak manager EXECUTES a concrete plan instead of free-soloing. Reuses the rubric at the Critic. Ralph-aware (freeze rubric iter 1; reasonableness gate iter 2+). Enforcement gate (shadow|enforce) on write/exec turns that skip delegation/Critic. #hottake disables the harness for one turn. Fail-open. (critique P1)

agentId.description: Only act for this agent id (default: main).

plannerModel.description: Ollama model for the planner + reasonableness call (default gpt-oss:20b). gemma4:12b is a lighter alternative that also keeps planner≠critic independence.

ollamaUrl.description: Ollama base URL (default http://127.0.0.1:11434 — Windows host from WSL2).

plannerTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout for the planner call; on timeout the turn proceeds unplanned (default 120000).

reasonablenessTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout for the Ralph reasonableness call (default 60000).

byteBudget.description: Max bytes of injected plan context per turn (default 3500).

gateMode.description: Enforcement gate: 'shadow' logs would-fire turns only; 'enforce' forces one revise pass (default shadow).

progress.description: Prepend a '⏱ Ns consumed · +Ns on <step> · step n/x+' header to visible manager replies so per-step elapsed time is visible (default true). Needs hooks.allowConversationAccess.

statusKey.description: Key for the live status page at GET /harness-status (non-localhost access requires ?key=<this>). Defaults to the gateway auth token. Set a dedicated value to avoid putting the gateway token in a URL.

notifyAfterSeconds.description: Ping Windows (via notifyCmd) once when an expert wait exceeds this many seconds — likely blocked on an exec approval (default 150; 0 disables).

notifyCmd.description: Command run with the alert message as its only arg when notifyAfterSeconds is exceeded (default scripts/notify-windows.sh, which pops a msg.exe dialog on Windows).

harnessDir.description: Harness root for rubric/plan/log files (default $HARNESS_ROOT or /home/pi/agent-harness).

experts.description: Override the dispatchable expert roster (id + role). Defaults mirror agents.list.
